violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelving in the walk-in cooler for the milk area was observed to have a buildup of food residue and debris. Non-food-contact surfaces of the storage shelving are to be cleaned at a frequency necessary to keep them clean and to preclude the buildup of food and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The inside of a refrigeration unit had an accumulation of biofilm 2) The fan covers in the walk-in cooler had dust build up New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. A hose is connected to the faucet at the ( ). This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
The receptacle in the employee restroom is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
